scripts/perf/phase3-compose-benchmark-sm.reason: Full Compose performance and scale proof harness; splitting would reduce auditability of the scenario unless a measured maintenance problem appears.

scripts/perf/phase3-benchmark.mjs.reason: Benchmark scenario runner and report writer; keep cohesive while it remains a proof artifact rather than production runtime.

scripts/verify-addresses/output/verified.reason: Generated compact verification vectors consumed by address proof tests; regenerate rather than manually refactor.

server/tests/fixtures/verified-address-v.reason: Checked-in compact fixture copy of verified address vectors for deterministic server tests.
